channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HIKAL] Hikal Ltd Closes Trading Window for Quarter Ending March 31, 2026
item.description:
Hikal Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for any Designated Person and their immediate relatives. The closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Hikal Code of Internal Procedures and conduct for Regulating, Monitoring and Reporting of Trading by Insiders. The trading window will be closed from April 01, 2026, till the expiry of 48 hours from the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026.

  • Hikal Ltd has closed the trading window for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • The trading window will be closed from April 01, 2026.
  • The closure will last till the expiry of 48 hours from the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HIKAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ASTERDM] Aster DM Healthcare Faces GST Penalty of Rs. 72,90,932 for Nonpayment of Insurance Processing Fees
item.description:
Aster DM Healthcare Ltd. has received an order under Section 74 of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 from the Assistant Commissioner, Kochi Commissionerate (Ernakulam Division) for nonpayment of GST on Insurance processing fees for the financial years 2019-20 to 2023-24. The total demand, including tax and penalty, amounts to Rs. 72,90,932. However, the company stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities. The order is appealable, and the company plans to exercise the legal remedies available under the GST law.

  • Aster DM Healthcare received an order under Section 74 of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 for nonpayment of GST on Insurance processing fees.
  • The total demand, including tax and penalty, amounts to Rs. 72,90,932 for the financial years 2019-20 to 2023-24.
  • The company stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.
  • The order is appealable, and the company plans to exercise the legal remedies available under the GST law.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aster DM Healthcare Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [AIIL] Trading Window Closure for Quarter Ended March 31, 2026 at Authum Investment & Infrastructure Ltd
item.description:
Authum Investment & Infrastructure Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window for all directors, designated persons, and their immediate relatives will remain closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the announcement/declaration of the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window will open 48 hours after the financial results are declared by the company to the stock exchanges. The date of the board meeting to approve the financial results will be intimated separately.

  • Trading window closure for quarter ended March 31, 2026
  • Applicable to all directors, designated persons, and their immediate relatives
  • Closure from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after financial results declaration
  • Trading window to open 48 hours after results declaration to stock exchanges
  • Date of board meeting for financial results approval to be intimated separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Authum Investment & Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RANDER] Trading Window Closure for Rander Corporation Ltd's Quarter and Year Ended March 31, 2026
item.description:
Rander Corporation Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the communication of the audited financial statements for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, to the Stock Exchange. Directors, designated persons, and other persons of the company have been informed not to trade in the securities of the company during this closure period.

  • Trading window closure for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
  • Closure in accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Window to remain closed from April 1, 2026
  • Closure to last until 48 hours after communication of audited financial statements to the Stock Exchange
  • Directors, designated persons, and other persons of the company have been informed not to trade during this period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RANDER CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RATNAKAR] Ratnakar Securities Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Q1 2026
item.description:
Ratnakar Securities Ltd, formerly known as Mangalya Soft-Tech Limited, has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in shares and securities of the company by the insiders. The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the announcement of the Audited financial results for the quarter ended on March 31, 2026. The company was under CIRP and the Resolution Plan is approved by Hon’ble NCLT, Ahmedabad Bench. The trading/dealing in securities of the Company is already suspended by the Stock Exchange for violation of SEBI & Stock Exchange Regulations. The company has paid BSE claim, listing fees, contingent liability, reinstatement fees and revocation fees in accordance with the approved Resolution Plan, and is in the process of relisting its shares at the BSE.

  • Ratnakar Securities Ltd announces closure of trading window for Q1 2026
  • Trading window to remain closed until 48 hours after the announcement of Q1 2026 financial results
  • Company was under CIRP, Resolution Plan approved by Hon’ble NCLT, Ahmedabad Bench
  • Trading/dealing in securities of the Company suspended by the Stock Exchange for violation of SEBI & Stock Exchange Regulations
  • Company has paid BSE claim, listing fees, contingent liability, reinstatement fees and revocation fees, and is in the process of relisting its shares at the BSE

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ratnakar Securities Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PANAFIC] Panafic Industrials Ltd. to Approve Restated Financial Statements for Proposed Right Issue
item.description:
Panafic Industrials Ltd. has announced a Board Meeting scheduled on 31st March, 2026. The agenda includes the consideration and approval of the Restated Financial Statements for the nine months period ending on 31st December, 2025 and for the years ended on 31st March, 2025, 2024, 2023 and 2022. The purpose of the restated financials is for a proposed right issue. The meeting will take place at the company's registered office in New Delhi.

  • Panafic Industrials Ltd. to hold a Board Meeting on 31st March, 2026
  • The meeting will consider and approve the Restated Financial Statements for the nine months period ending on 31st December, 2025 and for the years ended on 31st March, 2025, 2024, 2023 and 2022
  • The restated financials are for a proposed right issue
  • The meeting will take place at the company's registered office in New Delhi

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Panafic Industrials Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [DEVLAB] Dev Labtech Venture Ltd Closes Trading Window Until 48 Hours After Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Dev Labtech Venture Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all insiders and their immediate relatives, pursuant to the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited (standalone & consolidated) financial results for the half year and year ended 31st March, 2026. The date of the board meeting for considering these results will be intimated in due course.

  • Dev Labtech Venture Ltd closes trading window for insiders and their immediate relatives
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after Q4 results declaration in 2026
  • Action taken in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Board meeting date for considering financial results to be announced later
  • Trading window closure includes both standalone and consolidated financial results

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dev Labtech Venture Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HAVELLS] Havells India Ltd Closes Trading Window for Insider Trading Regulations Compliance
item.description:
Havells India Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in shares of the company. The closure is in accordance with the company's Code of Conduct, which is framed under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will be closed from 1st April, 2026, Wednesday, until 48 hours after the Board Meeting scheduled for the consideration of financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March, 2026. This move is to ensure compliance with the insider trading regulations.

  • Havells India Ltd closes trading window for insider trading regulations compliance.
  • Trading window to remain closed from 1st April, 2026, Wednesday.
  • Window to reopen 48 hours after the Board Meeting for financial results consideration.
  • Board Meeting scheduled for financial results of quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HAVELLS INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CAPITALSFB] Capital Small Finance Bank Re-appoints Mr. Munish Jain as Whole time Director for 3 Years
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd has announced the re-appointment of Mr. Munish Jain as a Whole time Director designated as Executive Director for a period of 3 years, subject to the approval of Reserve Bank of India (RBI). Mr. Jain, aged 47, holds a Bachelor’s degree in Commerce and is a Fellow Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) and a Fellow Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI). He has completed various executive programmes and professional training during his 25 years of experience in the banking sector. He is currently serving as the Whole-time Director (designated as Executive Director) of the Bank for a term of three years, starting from August 28, 2023.

  • Re-appointment of Mr. Munish Jain as Whole time Director for 3 years
  • Subject to approval from RBI
  • Mr. Jain holds a Bachelor’s degree in Commerce and is a Fellow Member of ICAI and ICSI
  • Over 25 years of experience in the banking sector
  • Currently serving as Whole-time Director (designated as Executive Director)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [YURANUS] Yuranus Infrastructure Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window Until After Q4 and Annual Financial Results for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Yuranus Infrastructure Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of unaudited financial results for the quarter and year ending on March 31, 2026. The board meeting date for the financial results declaration will be informed later. Designated persons and their immediate relatives are barred from trading in the company's securities during this period.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons and their immediate relatives from April 01, 2026
  • Closure continues until 48 hours after Q4 and annual financial results declaration on March 31, 2026
  • Board meeting date for financial results to be informed later
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives prohibited from trading in the company's securities during the closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Yuranus Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
